## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new conformance check
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (type check)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test (using `examples/sample-server` where possible)
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
